# Lightbox Digital

> Video production and photography studio in Phoenix, Arizona, founded by Josh Chappell.
> Makes commercials, brand stories, event films, FAA Part 107 drone footage,
> AI-generated video, and photography. Rated 5.0 across 11 Google reviews.

Contact: josh.lightbox@gmail.com
Service area: Phoenix, Scottsdale, Mesa, Tempe, Chandler, Gilbert, Glendale, all of Arizona.

## Pages
- [Home](https://lightbox-digital.com/): demo reel, selected work, services, FAQ
- [Work](https://lightbox-digital.com/work.html): 20 films — commercials, stories, events & spaces, AI
- [AI Videos](https://lightbox-digital.com/ai-videos.html): AI-generated commercials, incl. "Dave's Garage"
- [Photography](https://lightbox-digital.com/photography.html): portraits, brand, school, sports, events
- [About](https://lightbox-digital.com/about.html): the studio, founded by Josh Chappell
- [Reviews](https://lightbox-digital.com/reviews.html): 11 five-star Google reviews
- [Contact](https://lightbox-digital.com/contact.html): inquiry form

## Notable clients & projects
Grand Canyon University, Blandford Homes, Butterfly Wonderland, Baths For The Brave,
Arrowhead Lakes Dentistry, Applied Tech, Allen Land & Fire, NCAA event coverage.
